Home/Services/New Home Builds

Custom New Home Builds

From concept to completion, we design and build custom homes tailored to your lifestyle, budget, and aspirations.

Overview

Your Dream Home, Built to Last

Building a new home is one of life's most exciting journeys. At Design Homes, we make the process seamless and enjoyable, guiding you through every step from initial concept to handing over the keys.

Our team of experienced architects, designers, and builders work together to create homes that are not only beautiful but also functional, energy-efficient, and built to the highest Australian standards.

Custom designed to your brief
QBCC licensed builder
6-year structural warranty
Fixed-price contracts
Energy-efficient design
Premium material selection
Regular progress updates
Full project management
What We Offer

Why Choose Our Service

Custom Floor Plans

Every home is uniquely designed to match your family's needs, lifestyle, and the specific characteristics of your block.

Precision Engineering

We use the latest construction techniques and technologies to ensure structural integrity and longevity.

Fixed-Price Contracts

No surprises. Our fixed-price contracts give you complete peace of mind throughout the build process.

Energy Efficient

Smart design principles and quality materials ensure your home is energy efficient, reducing long-term running costs.

Quality Materials

We source only premium materials from trusted Australian suppliers, ensuring durability and lasting beauty.

On-Time Delivery

Our project management expertise ensures your home is delivered on schedule, with regular progress updates.
